name: product_page_3_products_father-time-mug

observed_strengths.observation: Reviews H2 and 'Details' H2 present — consistent PDP template with social proof and product details structure
Father's Day context: featured in homepage 'NEW ARRIVALS' and Father's Day sale banner — limited-time campaign creates urgency for this specific SKU

missing_or_weak.observation: All 3 sampled PDPs are non-coffee (gift card, Baba Yaga mug, Father Time mug) — the core coffee SKUs (Death Wish Coffee, Power Surge, Valhalla Java) are in rejected pages. Subscribe & Save toggle on main coffee PDPs is the key retention mechanism but was not observed.
No coffee cross-sell on mug PDP — 'Start the ritual: add your coffee' is a natural bundle play not visible in page structure

purchase_path_notes: Father Time Mug is a seasonal/limited item. The pattern across both mug PDPs: strong brand narrative, active reviews, but no coffee cross-sell. Adding coffee recommendations to all mug PDPs would increase basket size.
